title: Dangerous Food Habits | #shorts
full_text: my whole life I went nuts feeding my kids the best foods pow baji CH Puri hot hot even the most amazing kitri and broccoli you can imagine with fresh ground Hy really fresh ground HEI from the healthy root I used to do that and now my kid look at her she's eating this as if like she's never eaten in her life before Oh my God I am eating the best muscles in the entire world look it is so delicious it's my first muscles wow she's eating bugs
